title: toona hexandra var. candollei
intro: Toona hexandra var. candollei, also known as the Chinese cedar or Chinese toona, is a variety of the Toona hexandra tree native to Southeast Asia. It is a deciduous tree with aromatic leaves and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Toona hexandra var. candollei include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues, due to its high content of terpenoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Toona hexandra var. candollei include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make topical treatments for skin conditions and wounds.
